title: cirsium subinerme
intro: Cirsium subinerme, also known as the silky thistle or prickly thistle, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Cirsium subinerme include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are found in its flowers, leaves, and roots. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Cirsium subinerme is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used to make capsules or tinctures for its medicinal properties.
